messages.content:
英文重写：
Ni nanoparticles with different sizes were fabricated over the Ni/SAPO-11 catalyst via an ionic liquid assisted method.
Various sizes of Ni nanoparticles were produced using an ionic liquid assisted method on the Ni/SAPO-11 catalyst.
英语重写：fabricated over the Ni/SAPO-11 catalyst via
produced on the Ni/SAPO-11 catalyst through
语法检查：The above results elucidate the particle size effects on the bifunctional Ni/SAPO-11 catalyst could help to construct highly efficient catalysts for the n-hexane hydroisomerization.

The following is a corrected sentence:
The above results illuminate how particle size affects the bifunctional Ni/SAPO-11 catalyst, which could aid in developing highly efficient catalysts for n-hexane hydroisomerization.
这句话有问题么
这句话是没有语法错误的。它表达了一个可以理解的意思。
英文重写：Pseudo-boehmite (Solid content 70.0 wt%) was supplied by Yantai Henghui Petrochemical Co., Ltd. Phosphoric acid (H3PO4 85.0 wt%) was provided by XiRong Petrochemical Co., Ltd.
Yantai Henghui Petrochemical Co., Ltd. provided Pseudo-boehmite (70.0 wt% solid content) while XiRong Petrochemical Co., Ltd. supplied phosphoric acid (85.0 wt% H3PO4).
英文重写：SAPO-11 used in the impregnation process was synthesized according to the procedure reported before
The SAPO-11 utilized in the impregnation process was synthesized following the procedure previously reported.
indicating后面重写： indicating that the introduction of the ionic liquid can effectively increase the dispersion of Ni.
This indicates that the addition of the ionic liquid can enhance the dispersion of Ni significantly.
英文重写：The dark pots represent the metallic Ni particles in the TEM images.
In the TEM images, the black regions correspond to the metallic Ni particles.
英文降重：the Ni particle size over the catalysts calculated by the pulse CO chemisorption experiments is consistent with that from TEM.
The Ni particle size measured by pulse CO chemisorption experiments agrees with the one obtained through TEM analysis.
英文重写：the Ni0 2p3/2 peak shifts from 853.8 eV to 854.1 eV
There is a shift in the Ni0 2p3/2 peak, increasing from 853.8 eV to 854.1 eV.
